how_to_find_series: 2. Search for 'disability' to browse available series.
3. Each series has an ID like 'LNU02074593'. Copy that ID into the lists below.
4. BLS API v2 allows up to 50 series per request and 20 years per request.
5. With a registered API key you get 500 requests/day; without key, 25/day.

cps_disability_national.description: National-level labor force statistics for persons with a disability, from the Current Population Survey (CPS). BLS publishes these annually in 'Persons with a Disability: Labor Force Characteristics'. NOTE: These are national-level only — CPS sample size is insufficient for state-level disability breakdowns.

series.LNU01074593: Civilian labor force — with a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU02074593: Employment level — with a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU03074593: Unemployment level — with a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU04074593: Unemployment rate — with a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU01074601: Civilian labor force — without a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU02074601: Employment level — without a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU03074601: Unemployment level — without a disability, 16 years and over, NSA
series.LNU04074601: Unemployment rate — without a disability, 16 years and over, NSA

cps_disability_national.note: Verify each series ID at https://data.bls.gov/dataQuery/search before running. Series IDs above are based on published BLS documentation but should be confirmed.

additional_series.description: Add any additional BLS series IDs here in the same format as above.
